title: SPOT-OD v1.2.8 residual-refine figure/archive metadata fix
description: Archive and metadata repair release for SPOT-OD v1.2.8-residual-refine-figure-archive-fix. This release supersedes the metadata-inconsistent v1.2.7 Zenodo import, where the latest DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20839901 visibly retained stale v1.2.5 title/version metadata while the archived file was v1.2.7. The release preserves the bounded evidence scope: v1.2.7 residual-refinement is a retained-candidate learned-output proof of concept with a main-text figure and package clarification, not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not a full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not isolated message-passing evidence, and not broad learned-OD validation.
notes: This planned v1.2.8 metadata repair treats DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20839901 as the metadata-inconsistent record being superseded/repaired: visible metadata reports stale v1.2.5 text while the file is v1.2.7. The coherent public GitHub evidence release for the residual-refinement PoC remains v1.2.7-residual-refine-poc until v1.2.8 is published. No v1.2.8 DOI, release commit, archived-file hash, or asset hash is asserted by this metadata file before the release exists. The evidence remains a compact-simulator retained-candidate residual-refinement PoC only, with no upgrade to operational POD, public precise-reference validation, independent-machine reproduction, full raw/training/all-filter rerun, standalone learned recursive filtering, isolated message-passing evidence, or broad learned-OD validation.
